### 58. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: 16dd4f18-0b06-4dd1-8adb-5305df10801c
If the product is an 'Existing Product', the 'Debriefing' leads to 'Costing sheets approval' by Creative direction.
> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"] --(Existing Product)--> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets approval"]

### 59. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: 705ac15c-35d6-4127-a564-eeb8d8dc44ab
If the product is a 'New Product Type', the 'Debriefing' leads to 'Costing sheets elaboration' by Technical designers.
> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"] --(New Product Type)--> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"]

### 60. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: f6c2ee0f-db6c-45f4-b015-8e8bfa45937b
If Sales confirms the buyer approves the Price, then the 'Price' is established by the Factories.
> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"] --(If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price)--> [Rectangle: "Price"]

### 61. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: 773ae931-a1b7-446f-a8c8-6946b7b22325
If the 'Licensor's comment' is about a 'legal line or packaging', a 'Tech Pack Update' is performed by Technical designers.
> [Rectangle: "Licensor's comment"] --(If comment is legal line or packaging)--> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Update"]

### 62. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: dd4dff87-2bfb-4ed9-bf2b-f7bbb0e61658
If the 'Audit: Fail', then 'Re-sampling' is required by the Factories.
> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Fail)--> [Rectangle: "Re-sampling"]

### 63. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: ea21aea3-f73a-4fa7-a600-08d64d45841b
If the 'Audit: Pass', then the Licensing Team performs 'PPS Submit to licensor'.
> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Pass)--> [Rectangle: "PPS Submit to licensor"]

### 64. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: 05ae53dc-7518-4ddc-bf48-9b4c33b75095
If the buyer places an order 'With an Order', then Carlos initiates a 'Production order'.
> [Rectangle: "Buyer places an order"] --(With an Order)--> [Rectangle: "Production order"]

### 65. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: c6461c99-e368-4eed-813e-2feeaeaccccb
For 'existing products' in 'Mass Production', the next step is to 'Ship to US'.
> [Rectangle: "Mass Production"] --(For existing products)--> [Rectangle: "Ship to US"]

### 66. exception_rule / observed_practice / pending_review
ID: 157a73be-8324-4707-8082-ad64a6e5c2b4
For 'New Items' in 'Mass Production', Carlos handles 'Professional Photos'.
> [Rectangle: "Mass Production"] --(For New Items)--> [Rectangle: "Professional Photos"]

### 67. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 2ece01f0-a562-40ce-a5a3-01a6fb844078
After a meeting with the buyer or review of trendboards, a Design Request Format is generated.
> [Rectangle: "Meeting w Buyer / Trendboards"] --> [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"]

### 68. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 603f5c3c-c052-4e2c-8a4e-7ca321daf854
A call or email from the buyer leads to the generation of a Design Request Format.
> [Rectangle: "Call/email from the buyer"] --> [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"]

### 69. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 6c36e56b-445c-4731-a9e8-3a6d476ce174
An Agenda template/Kick off Meeting leads to the creation of a card for Style guides, which serves as input for designers.
> [Rectangle: "Agenda template/ Kick off Meeting"] --> [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"]

### 70. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: cfb99829-c8f2-449e-93d7-d3bee7bb21af
The Design Request Format is used to create pre-brief design notes and confirm sizing.
> [Rectangle: "Design Request Format"] --> [Rectangle: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"]

### 71. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 63922956-60e2-41f3-85c7-7c4bd7e4bbed
Pre-brief design notes and size confirmation lead to the creation of a design brief.
> [Rectangle: "Pre-brief design notes + Confirming size"] --> [Rectangle: "Brief"]

### 72. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 1990c33d-1a48-47d9-a468-410eb88e1e7c
A design brief is followed by a debriefing session.
> [Rectangle: "Brief"] --> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"]

### 73. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 77028de4-f9dc-4173-9d3b-2c606bf6c2b4
For existing products, the debriefing leads to costing sheets approval.
> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"] --(Existing Product)--> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets approval"]

### 74. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: ad270854-b4d1-4882-8eeb-3665f52f4b88
For new product types, the debriefing leads to costing sheets elaboration.
> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"] --(New Product Type)--> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"]

### 75. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: be4cfa22-de3e-41f7-a5bc-725356a14184
The debriefing stage initiates the 'Design in Progress' phase.
> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"] --> [Rectangle: "Design in Progress"]

### 76. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 96c7b5c3-7f46-460b-b94d-d319a70ecdb7
Costing sheets approval leads to costing sheets elaboration.
> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"]

### 77. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 150a1040-e36d-489f-ae32-675271bcef28
Costing sheets approval also leads to costing sheets/tech pack elaboration.
> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"]

### 78. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 4c8fcb65-3a39-405a-86c8-e91dcb42c5a7
Costing sheets elaboration results in uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code.
> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

### 79. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: dfeb7aeb-f615-422d-a6bd-9d1e215cfc10
Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration results in uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code.
> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"] --> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"]

### 80. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: a9896b21-f995-4ffc-afc5-0aa3cf51f691
Uploading to DFlow with an RFQ code leads to sending an RFQ to factories.
> [Rectangle: "Upload to DFlow RFQ code"] --> [Rectangle: "RFQ to Factories"]

### 81. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: f5dc45b9-034c-4c7e-bb26-a1dbd4838c6b
Sending an RFQ to factories results in receiving details and limitations from the factories.
> [Rectangle: "RFQ to Factories"] --> [Rectangle: "Details and Limitations"]

### 82. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: c507be3d-ae49-4ea0-83ff-70bb3a9711c7
The 'Details and Limitations' received from factories prompt the sourcing team to ask factories about limitations.
> [Rectangle: "Details and Limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"]

### 83. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 41d34129-8f30-4f74-b1a5-79c0f6afc112
After asking factories about limitations, the sourcing team provides details in Click Up.
> [Rectangle: "Asking the factories about limitations"] --> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"]

### 84. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: d41e8fd7-2085-4891-8411-96d52697176b
If Sales confirms the buyer approves the price, the price information is then used.
> [Rectangle: "Provide details in Click Up"] --(If Sales confirms buyer approves the Price)--> [Rectangle: "Price"]

### 85. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 86d1ecae-d1e4-464f-b5e6-a1bf2ceefc4f
The approved price leads to the creation of SKUs in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp.
> [Rectangle: "Price"] --> [Rectangle: "SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)"]

### 86. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 1ad64fab-8366-4096-9d74-208f68e4268d
The creation of a style guide card for designers leads to the selection of assets and compositions.
> [Rectangle: "Create card: Style guides - input for designers"] --> [Rectangle: "Assets/ compositions selection"]

### 87. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: b672c3d3-c075-4c5d-9fbd-53c80ef2c606
Asset and composition selection leads to costing sheets/tech pack elaboration.
> [Rectangle: "Assets/ compositions selection"] --> [Rectangle: "Costing sheets/Tech Pack elaboration"]

### 88. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 945017dc-319b-4775-920a-22bb6f947179
The 'Design in Progress' stage leads to updating the DFlow Library and adding a reference number in the PPT.
> [Rectangle: "Design in Progress"] --> [Rectangle: "DFlow Library + Reference number in PPT"]

### 89. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 283a6684-65ae-43e4-a38f-6f6d2eefe8b6
Tech packing is followed by tech pack approval.
> [Rectangle: "Tech Packing"] --> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Approval"]

### 90. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 8685f468-e248-4bf7-bcf5-4f3d4713b24d
Tech pack approval leads to tech pack submit authorization.
> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"]

### 91. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 159ab343-3e5f-4124-b880-e2b31e9f46a3
Tech pack submit authorization leads to licensor's comment.
> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [Rectangle: "Licensor's comment"]

### 92. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: e53df74b-ca5c-4f6d-bbb0-58b98cf5c50c
A tech pack update requires another tech pack submit authorization.
> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Update"] --> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"]

### 93. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 2228b347-fcea-469b-aa20-1db79479a514
Revisions implementation leads back to the 'Design in Progress' stage.
> [Rectangle: "Revisions implementation"] --> [Rectangle: "Design in Progress"]

### 94. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 42d18036-893b-4016-9d90-0e003fd05299
Tech pack submit authorization leads to concept submission to the licensor.
> [Rectangle: "Tech Pack Submit Authorization"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

### 95. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 8b77e931-7232-4ebe-b80c-33c7d323b0b6
Concept submission to the licensor can result in concept revisions.
> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Revisions"]

### 96. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 81684d95-a08b-48dd-98f7-95615909fa75
Concept revisions require a resubmission.
> [Rectangle: "Concept Revisions"] --> [Rectangle: "Resubmit"]

### 97. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: fa4364c5-c362-44d1-9557-99c03f5cc15c
A resubmission goes back to the 'Concept Submit to Licensor' stage.
> [Rectangle: "Resubmit"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Submit to Licensor"]

### 98. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: b78bfb39-9fef-4a48-b794-74ab8e353f4f
Concept revisions can lead to a 'Concept Approved w comments' status.
> [Rectangle: "Concept Revisions"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Approved w comments"]

### 99. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 566d5f76-4149-4421-bf31-8383c1e21f0f
A 'Concept Approved w comments' status requires comments approval.
> [Rectangle: "Concept Approved w comments"] --> [Rectangle: "Comments approval"]

### 100. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 999b68cd-d987-49b9-8425-74d1e7dfc2f7
Comments approval leads to the 'Concept Approved' status.
> [Rectangle: "Comments approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept Approved"]

### 101. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 771f501c-f107-411f-889a-0c13448723cc
A 'Concept Approved' status leads to SKU creation in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp.
> [Rectangle: "Concept Approved"] --> [Rectangle: "SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)"]

### 102. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 30c507f4-72b6-4385-82d3-17060c4c07af
SKU creation in DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, and ClickUp leads to uploading the concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp.
> [Rectangle: "SKUs creation (DFlow, ColdLion, MasterData, ClickUp)"] --> [Rectangle: "Concept image to ColdLion and ClickUp"]

### 103. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 17be880b-e0b9-4d11-ad6e-92e816f0ccda
A PPS Audit leads to reviewing the audit and sending it to the factory.
> [Rectangle: "PPS Audit"] --> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"]

### 104. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 6cc77117-99e0-4c7d-8192-d6debbe1973e
If an audit fails, re-sampling is required.
> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Fail)--> [Rectangle: "Re-sampling"]

### 105. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 254d4257-2009-420d-88ff-9d455a8a89f1
If an audit passes, the PPS is submitted to the licensor.
> [Rectangle: "Review Audit and send to factory"] --(If Audit: Pass)--> [Rectangle: "PPS Submit to licensor"]

### 106. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: db1694c7-5fe7-4aed-a3ed-eb4dcc3b4ae9
Re-sampling leads to sampling.
> [Rectangle: "Re-sampling"] --> [Rectangle: "Sampling"]

### 107. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 3beaf762-66e0-4da2-98c3-b0d02742888c
Sampling leads to a PPS Audit.
> [Rectangle: "Sampling"] --> [Rectangle: "PPS Audit"]

### 108. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 51acefcd-c810-4770-acdb-c89b9604e745
Submitting the PPS to the licensor leads to PPS approval.
> [Rectangle: "PPS Submit to licensor"] --> [Rectangle: "PPS Approved"]

### 109. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 1a776a06-0417-4582-8513-33d1d955d646
PPS approval leads to samples being shipped to the US.
> [Rectangle: "PPS Approved"] --> [Rectangle: "Samples shipped to US"]

### 110. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 26c061ee-29f7-46bf-bdde-15def92b6887
Samples shipped to the US undergo internal approval.
> [Rectangle: "Samples shipped to US"] --> [Rectangle: "Samples Internal Approval"]

### 111. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 4c64955f-dbba-4c12-9204-6597d779499d
Internal samples approval leads to buyer's approval of samples.
> [Rectangle: "Samples Internal Approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Samples Buyer's approval"]

### 112. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 79c27e77-6a99-4739-9674-493abc8bec8f
Buyer's approval of samples leads to the buyer placing an order.
> [Rectangle: "Samples Buyer's approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Buyer places an order"]

### 113. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 05e5bcd8-ecd0-4bd1-aeca-f4a31ed66d84
If an order is placed, it leads to a production order.
> [Rectangle: "Buyer places an order"] --(With an Order)--> [Rectangle: "Production order"]

### 114. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 9acb079d-30c4-4ba7-860e-ae5c54616b02
A production order leads to mass production.
> [Rectangle: "Production order"] --> [Rectangle: "Mass Production"]

### 115. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 26a9590b-0dce-4e20-8e09-ec138a9bb5a1
For existing products, mass production leads to shipping to the US.
> [Rectangle: "Mass Production"] --(For existing products)--> [Rectangle: "Ship to US"]

### 116. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: a0f94244-1568-4bd6-8a88-d19708cc1664
For new items, mass production leads to professional photos.
> [Rectangle: "Mass Production"] --(For New Items)--> [Rectangle: "Professional Photos"]

### 117. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 4a471330-e345-4a4e-9a27-83769b836784
Professional photos require professional photos approval.
> [Rectangle: "Professional Photos"] --> [Rectangle: "Professional Photos Approval"]

### 118. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 8aa6b8aa-9186-4699-a2fa-abb8074b7930
Professional photos approval leads to shipping to the US.
> [Rectangle: "Professional Photos Approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Ship to US"]

### 119. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: ce529d9b-cccd-43cb-b8a5-d314ee28d36f
Buyer's approval leads to picks confirmation to the Project Manager.
> [Rectangle: "Buyer's Approval"] --> [Rectangle: "Picks confirmation to PM"]

### 120. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 3235fbd7-f729-4d62-b578-0e2529f90a28
Picks confirmation to the Project Manager leads back to Buyer's Approval.
> [Rectangle: "Picks confirmation to PM"] --> [Rectangle: "Buyer's Approval"]

### 121. process_rule / policy / pending_review
ID: 86652d59-eaca-49ff-a223-615dcb5ccb0f
The 'For Customer Refresh' process leads to debriefing.
> [Rectangle: "For Customer Refresh"] --> [Rectangle: "Debriefing"]

### 122. process_rule / policy / approved
ID: 476e9820-39bc-431a-8c80-44ffcd2df1d8
For existing items, shipping to the US marks the end of the process.
> [Rectangle: "Ship to US"] --(For Existing Items)--> [End]
